LightningComponentBundle.description: FAQ Accordion Component - Displays FAQ content in an accordion format with 3 sections. First section is expanded by default. Implements WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards.

property.name: sections
property.label: FAQ Sections (JSON)
property.description: JSON array of FAQ section objects with question and answer properties. Example: [{'question':'Q1','answer':'A1'}]

property.name: defaultExpandedIndex
property.label: Default Expanded Section Index
property.description: Index of the section to expand by default (0-based). Default is 0 (first section).

property.name: allowMultipleOpen
property.label: Allow Multiple Sections Open
property.description: Allow multiple accordion sections to be open simultaneously. Default is false (only one section open at a time).
